Savings Overview

MemberAmountTypeDateMethod
{tx.member} 0?'#34d399':'#ff7b7b'}}>{tx.amount>0?`+$${Math.abs(tx.amount)}`:`-$${Math.abs(tx.amount)}`} {tx.type} {tx.date} {tx.method}
); } export default Transactions;
